Invoices to be Raised (AR)

Client invoice not yet issued
Cycles where you should raise an invoice to the client. Year 1: due by contract start + 15 days. Renewals: due 7 days before anniversary.
Target Raise Date Client / Product Cycle Amount Urgency Action

OEM Invoices Expected (AP)

Awaiting OEM to send invoice
Cycles where the OEM should have invoiced us by now. Follow up if overdue.
Expected Date OEM / Product Cycle Amount Urgency Action

Contracts Expiring Soon (Renewal Engine)

Contracts expiring in the next 90 days that haven't been confirmed renewed yet. Act early on critical (≤30d) renewals to protect retained revenue.
Expiry Date Client / Product Annual Value Days Left Renewal Status Action

Actionable Invoices & Operations (Cross-Portfolio)

Rules: Year 1 invoices due 15d after start. Renewals 7d before anniversary.

System Controls & Data Management

Company Profile
Templates
OEM & Product Master
Storage & Backup
Migration & Diagnostics

Company Profile

Your company details appear on every Proposal, PO, and Invoice
Fill this in once — it's the foundation for all outbound documents. Fields marked * are required.
Identity
Shown on letterhead / branding. Defaults to Legal Name.
Primary GSTIN. State code is auto-derived.
Registered Address
Branding
No logo uploaded
PNG / JPG / SVG — max 300 KB. Transparent background recommended.
No signature uploaded
PNG / JPG — max 150 KB. Transparent or white background.
No letterhead uploaded. PDFs will use the default layout.
Upload a full-page A4 letterhead image (PNG or JPG — max 800 KB). For best results use A4 portrait at 150-300 DPI. When set, proposal PDFs will render content over this letterhead and the GSTIN/PAN/logo shown at the top of the PDF will be suppressed (since they're expected to be baked into the letterhead).

Tip: If your letterhead is a Word document or PDF, open it, export as PNG/JPG at A4 size, then upload the exported image here.
Authorised Signatory
Bank Details (printed on invoices for client remittance)
Document Numbering & Defaults
Auto-increments after each proposal is issued.
—
Auto-increments after each PO is issued.
—
Auto-increments after each invoice is issued.
—
Terms Templates Library
Maintain multiple named templates per document type — e.g. "Standard", "Enterprise", "Government". One is marked the default and auto-loads when creating new documents. Switch between templates on the document form at time of creation. Clients can also be locked to a specific template via Client Master.
Proposal Templates
Purchase Order Templates
Invoice Templates

OEM & Product Master

Maintain the central catalog of OEMs (vendors / principals) and the products you sell from each. Used to populate dropdowns across prospects, proposals, POs, and invoices. Includes contact info, registered address, and optional default GST treatment.

Attachments Storage

Files attached to prospects, proposals, contracts, purchase orders, and invoices are stored locally in your browser. Since storage is shared with all CRM data, attachments are kept compact. Use the Manage All button above to review, download, or delete any attachment.

Active Portfolio Export

Generates a detailed Excel (.xlsx) report of your current portfolio. Useful for offline analysis or sharing with finance teams.

Accounting & E-Invoicing Export

Generates a flattened, line-item report of all Client (AR) and Vendor (AP) invoices. Optimized for sharing with your CA, IRN generation, and direct import into accounting software (e.g. Tally, Zoho Books). Features split GST values.

Manual System Backup

Creates a complete snapshot of your entire CRM — every contract, proposal, purchase order, invoice, client, OEM, attachment, and setting — bundled into a single JSON file with a schema version stamp for safe future migration.

1. Project Workspace

Select a local folder on your computer. This allows the system to save backups and data directly to a trusted location.

Linked

2. Direct Disk Sync

Link a specific .json database file. Once linked, any changes you make in the app will automatically save to this file.

Bulk Provisioning

Upload a CSV/Excel file to add multiple subscriptions at once. Use the template for correct formatting.

Upload CSV / Excel

Restore System Data

Danger Zone: This will completely overwrite your current system data with the selected backup file.

Advanced

Tools for advanced maintenance. Most users never need these — they exist for cases where the one-time migrations were skipped or need to be re-run.
Phase 4A — Reseller Migration
Status: —
Consistency Scan (Prospects · Proposals · POs · Invoices)
Detects: proposal client-name mismatches, PO commercial-routing drift from linked proposal, invoice routing drift from linked contract/proposal, and legacy PO free-text reseller entries. Downloads a full JSON backup before any change.
Commission Payable — Portfolio Summary
Accruals auto-create on Paid+Commission invoices. Record payouts from each reseller's detail page.

Prospect Facts

New Prospect

Opportunity
A short, unique label you'll recognise this deal by.
Select one or more OEMs first
Manage OEMs & products via OEM & Product Master
Value & Timeline
Annual Contract Value — per-year revenue from this deal.
Total contract duration (e.g. 12 for 1yr, 36 for 3yr).
When you expect the client to say yes / issue PO. Drives the "This Quarter" forecast.
When the subscription goes live / invoicing begins. Often same as close date, but can be later.
Pipeline Stage & Priority
Leave blank to use the stage default. Override when a specific deal's confidence differs — e.g. a Negotiation deal where the CFO has verbally approved deserves 90% not 70%.
Left-border colour on the Kanban card.
Contact & Source
Company Info — Optional
Fills into Client Master if/when this prospect converts. All fields optional.
Commercial Routing
How will revenue flow for this deal? Used for proposal/PO/invoice routing.
Tags & Notes

Mark as Won

Confirm the deal details. On save, the Provisioning form will open pre-populated with this data so you can finalise the contract.

Mark as Lost

Lost deals stay in the system — patterns here are where the insights are. Please capture the reason.

for —

Attachments Manager

Global Storage Usage
—
Limits: 500 KB per file · 2 MB per entity · 4 MB global soft limit (warning above this) · 4.5 MB hard block to preserve CRM operation. Browser localStorage caps total CRM data at ~5 MB — keep attachments compact.

Terms Preview — —

Preview of how the Terms & Conditions and Payment Terms will appear on the generated PDF. Actual styling may adjust slightly to fit the page and letterhead.

Add New Client

Company Identity
Contacts
Add as many contacts as needed. Mark one as Primary — it appears on proposals, invoices, and in list views.
Compliance & Legal
Default Commercial Routing — Optional
Pre-fills new Prospects / Proposals / POs for this client. Always overridable per deal.
Resellers and channel partners are managed separately in the Resellers / Partners module. If this client typically comes through one reseller, set it here — otherwise leave as Direct.
Only required when model is Resale or Commission.
GSTIN Registrations
Add one per state registration — mark one as Primary.
Billing Addresses
Optionally link each to a GSTIN for accurate invoicing.
Shipping / Delivery Addresses
Custom Terms for This Client
Override the default terms templates from Company Profile for this specific client. Enable the toggle for a document type below to override its default terms and payment terms — useful for key accounts with negotiated T&C (e.g. specific BFSI or government clients with their own mandated clauses).

Reseller Identity

Bank Details — Optional
Used for commission payouts and remittance confirmation.
Reseller Settings
These drive commercial routing in Phases 4B–4D — no effect on current transactions yet.
%
₹ per invoice
Used only for Commission model. Per-deal & per-invoice overrides still win.
Default OFF. Turn ON only if this reseller explicitly requires end-user name on the invoice.
Default OFF. If ON, proposals can optionally route to end-client contact.
Internal Notes

Phase 4A Migration Review

What this does: moves existing reseller-tagged records from Client Master into the new Reseller/Partner Master. A full JSON backup + a Client Master CSV will download to your Downloads folder before any change is committed. You can approve, adjust, or cancel.
If you cancel, the review will not reappear automatically. You can re-trigger it from System Controls → Advanced.

Consistency Repair — Prospects · Proposals · POs · Invoices

A full JSON backup downloads automatically before any change. Only checked items in auto-fixable categories are modified — legacy free-text items are informational only.

Record Commission Payout

Historical Commission Backfill

A JSON backup downloads before accruals are created. Each backfilled accrual is tagged backfilled: true so you can identify them.
